raw_excerpt:
# ROUND_5 EDA — Per-Product

A single-pass, exhaustive EDA over R5 days 2/3/4. Every script in this folder
analyses **each of the 50 products independently**, one row per
`(product, day)` (or `(product, day, bucket)` for the seasonality script).

Each script writes two artifacts under `outputs/`:
- `<section>.csv` — machine-readable, full numeric precision
- `<section>.md` — markdown table for fast eyeballing

## Sections

| # | Script | What it produces |
|--:|--------|------------------|
| 00 | `00_overview.py` | row coverage, NaN map, mid availability, frac(bid=0), frac(ask=1) |
| 01 | `01_distributions.py` | mid mean / std / quantiles / skew / kurtosis / Jarque-Bera |
| 02 | `02_spread_depth.py` | spread mean/median/std, frac of spread=1/2/≥3, L1 + total volume per side, L1 imbalance |
